Education

Research

Microeconomic Theory, Game Theory, Contract Theory, Organizational Economics, IO

Working Papers

  • (Dis-)agreement in Misspecified Games 
  • Pay to Quit: Robust Team Incentives with Hidden Need  (with Hyungmin Park)
    Best Graduate Paper Award, 15th Lisbon Meetings in Game Theory and Applications

Publication

  • Vertical Mergers in Ecosystems with Consumer Hold-Up (with Daniele Condorelli and Jorge Padilla)
    Journal of Industrial Economics, 2024

Presentations

    PhD Microeconomic Theory Workshop LSE, UCL and Warwick (London);

    37th Stony Brook International Conference on Game Theory;
